scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c blue,green "npm run _build:shared && npm run build -w @birthday/backend && APP_MODE=dev node apps/backend/dist/index.js" "npm run dev:tools -w @birthday/frontend"
scripts.local-web:dev: npm run _build:shared && npm run prebuild -w @birthday/frontend && npm run dev:local-web -w @birthday/frontend
scripts._build: npm run _build:shared && npm run build -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
scripts._build:cloud: npm run _build:shared && npm run prebuild -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build:cloud -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
scripts._build:local-web: npm run _build:shared && npm run prebuild -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build:local-web -w @birthday/frontend
scripts._build:dev: npm run _build:shared && npm run build:dev-tools -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
